2004October 3, 2004

🇺🇸 Seattle, USA

Resolutions of the plenary meeting of ISO/TC 184/SC 4, Seattle, United States, October 3, 2004 -- October 8, 2004

Meeting URNurn:iso:tc:184:sc:4:meeting:plenary-2004-10-seattle-wa-usa

15 Resolutions

629Plenary
Appoint Timothy King as liaison to OASIS PLCS Technical Committee
SC 4 accepts the nomination of Dr. Timothy King as the OASIS PLCS Technical Committee Liaison, and nominates Dr. Timothy King as the SC 4 liaison to the OASIS PLCS Technical Committee.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
628Plenary
Split ISO 13584-501 and direct IEC SC 65B liaison actions
SC 4 decides to split the scope of the registered dictionary defined by ISO 13584 Part 501 (ISO id 39753) into two parts, covering (a) laboratory and environment measuring instruments and (b) indus...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
627Plenary
Appoint Wolfgang Wilkes and Gerry Radack as liaisons to ISO/IEC JWG 1
SC 4 appoints Dr. Wolfgang Wilkes and Dr. Gerry Radack as the SC 4 Rapporteurs to ISO/IEC/JWG 1.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
626Plenary
Create ad hoc group to assess SASIG PDQ 2.0 PAS proposal
SC 4 creates an ad hoc group led by Oscar Rocha to assess the proposal from SASIG to transpose the PDQ 2.0 guidelines into a Publicly Available Specification (PAS).
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
625Plenary
Create NWI for lifecycle support of AEC facilities
The goal of this PWI is to create a NWI for a model for lifecycle support of AEC facilities. The following tasks will be performed: * Detailed in scope, out of scope analysis of the information req...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
624Plenary
Appoint Darren Meister as Education and Outreach Rapporteur
SC 4 appoints Mr. Darren Meister as the new SC 4 Education and Outreach Rapporteur to act as the focal point for SC 4 outreach, education, and promotional activities. These activities should be clo...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
623Plenary
Request retention of ISO/TS 10303-28 ed1 after ed2 publication
SC 4 requests the ISO Central Secretariat to retain the listing of ISO TS 10303-28 edition 1 in the ISO catalogue of available International Standards, after the publication of the ISO TS 10303-28 ...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
622Plenary
Request ISO CS consider module progress to avoid AP cancellation
SC 4 requests ISO to consider the progress of individual modules when deciding whether it is appropriate to cancel an AP Project for lack of progress. In particular, ballot submission of a substant...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
621Plenary
Approve project leader for ISO 10303-0058
SC 4 approves the following new project leaders or project editors for the associated SC 4 projects: |=== |Project |Leader |Editor |ISO 10303-0058 |Nils Sandsmark | |===

Acclamation
Acclamation

ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
ISO/TC 184/SC 4

Industrial data

Standardization of the content, meaning, structure, representation and quality management of information for engineered products throughout their lifecycle.

Committee

  • Secretariat: ANSI (Secretariat)
  • Chair: Kenneth Swope
  • Established: 1984
  • Standards: 822 published
  • Members: 21 (P), 14 (O)
